zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Wright於1674年5月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓時，他的父親James Wright35歲，母親Abigail Jesse29歲。他於1697年11月3日與Rebeckah Sykes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1734年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆勒班農享年59歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州托藍德哥倫比亞笛卡爾 亞德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Wright于1674年5月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓时，他的父亲James Wright35岁，母亲Abigail Jesse29岁。他于1697年11月3日与Rebeckah Sykes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1734年4月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆勒班農享年59岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州托藍德哥倫比亞笛卡爾 亞德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: Windham County was created from Hartford and New London counties on May 12, 1726

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Wright was born on 16 May 1674, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, James Wright, was 35 and his mother, Abigail Jesse, was 29. He married Rebeckah Sykes on 3 November 1697, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 April 1734, in Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59, and was buried in Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Wright est né le 16 mai 1674, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, James Wright, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Abigail Jesse, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Rebeckah Sykes le 3 novembre 1697, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1734, à Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Wright am 16. Mai 1674 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Wright 35 und seine Mutter Abigail Jesse 29. Er hat am 3. November 1697 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Rebeckah Sykes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. April 1734 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Wright è nato il il 16 maggio 1674 nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, James Wright, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Jesse, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Rebeckah Sykes il 3 novembre 1697, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 aprile 1734, nel Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Wrightが1674年5月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父James Wrightは35歳，母Abigail Jesseは29歳であった。1697年11月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでRebeckah Sykesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1734年4月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムレバノンで59歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコルンビアオルド ヤード セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Wright(이)가 1674년 5월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Wright(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Jesse(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1697년 11월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Rebeckah Sykes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1734년 4월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 레바넌에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 콜럼비아 드 야어드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Wright nasceu em 16 de maio de 1674, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, James Wright, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Jesse, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebeckah Sykes em 3 de novembro de 1697, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1734, em Lebanon, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Wright родился 16 мая 1674 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени James Wright было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Jesse, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebeckah Sykes 3 ноября 1697 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 апреля 1734 г. в местности лебанон, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности олд ярд кеметири, колумбя, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Wright nació el 16 de mayo de 1674, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, James Wright, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Abigail Jesse, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Rebeckah Sykes el 3 de noviembre de 1697, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de abril de 1734, en Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
